channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: SpaceCraft launches in Early Access on May 20
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Forge a story among the stars.

Large-scale multiplayer space sandbox game SpaceCraft will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam on May 20, developer Shiro Games announced.

“SpaceCraft is about giving players the tools to shape a living, player-driven universe at their own pace,” said Shiro Games CEO Nicolas Cannasse in a press release. “Whether you focus on industry, trade, or exploration, every decision contributes to a larger ecosystem when Early Access begins next month.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Shiro Games:

Step into a vast, seamless universe spanning multiple star systems, where players can freely transition from deep space travel to planetary exploration. Chart your own path through the cosmos, discover new worlds, and use Faster-Than-Light travel to expand your reach across the stars.

Scan planets and asteroid belts to uncover valuable resources, then mine, refine, and transform them into advanced ship components. Trade and/or sell resources to other players while managing production, logistics, and resource flows to grow your operations.

Start small and grow into a major industrial force. Establish planetary bases, automate production lines, and deploy fleets of drones and cargo ships to extract, process, and transport resources across systems. Optimize your operations and scale your network to control the flow of materials across the galaxy.

Form or join Corporations to collaborate with other players, assign roles, and coordinate large-scale operations. Take on contracts, specialize your fleet with modular upgrades, and master interstellar logistics to outcompete rivals, or carve your own path alone.

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/spacecraft-launches-in-early-access-on-may-20
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cairn free DLC ‘On the Trail’ announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5

Due out this summer.

Developer The Game Bakers has announced survival climbing adventure game Cairn downloadable content “On the Trail.” It will launch this summer as a free download.

Here is an overview of the downloadable content, via The Game Bakers:

The Game Bakers reveal free downloadable content “On the Trail” for the critically acclaimed survival climber Cairn. “On the Trail: Deep Water” is the first of a series of free downloadable content bringing Cairn climbers with new climbing locations and fresh challenges as they follow the trail of a legendary climber. The downloadable content brings three new climbing areas, and introduces water soloing: players can now climb over water, without the consequences of plummeting to their death! Marco won’t be cheering from the sideline anymore, players can now climb with him or Aava. The climb begins again in summer 2026.

Cairn is available now for PlayStation 5 and PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below.

DLC “On the Trail” Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/cairn-free-dlc-on-the-trail-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Side-scrolling co-op horror game Lost Railway announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Closed playtest now available.

Polden Publishing and developer Crossbridge Game Studios have announced side-scrolling cooperative horror game Lost Railway for PC (Steam). A closed playtest is available now.

Here is an overview of the game, via Polden Publishing:

About

Enter Lost Railway, a 2D cooperative horror with up to four players where the world is dark and grim, but you play as a cute and resilient animal survivor. Explore wastelands on your train and gather all kinds of useful resources to keep it moving. Scavenge for loot in old, forgotten bunkers, fight off unspeakable mutated horrors and get back alive with your friends.

Key Features

  • New Dimension of Cooperative Horror – Team up with four players in the first cooperative 2D quota horror. Atmospheric visuals meet high-intensity extraction survival gameplay.
  • Loot Your Way Out – Every run is a desperate trip for loot, tools and resources for your train. Grab everything worth carrying and make it back alive.
  • Cute Animals and Terrifying Monsters – Play as cute yet resilient animal survivors in a world full of scary monsters. Very charming on the surface, but horrifying underneath.
  • Some Battles Are Won By Running – Fight common and elite enemies with scavenged weapons. Beware—invincible enemies can’t be stopped, only avoided.
  • Every Second Counts – More loot keeps your train moving, but every bunker door is on a timer. Control your greed and scavenge fast—supplies are scarce, and the clock is ticking.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/side-scrolling-co-op-horror-game-lost-railway-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Black Tabby Publishing and sunset visitor announce sci-fi narrative adventure game Prove You’re Human for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

An AI dares to dream she is human.

Black Tabby Publishing and 1000xRESIST developer sunset visitor have announced Prove You’re Human, a science-fiction narrative adventure game that puts players in the role of a digital copy of a person convinced it is human. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Black Tabby Publishing:

About

An AI dares to dream she is human. You’ve been hired to put her in her place.

From the creators of the Peabody award-winning 1000xRESIST and published by the creators of Slay the Princess.

Prove You’re Human splits the main character in two, and you drew the short straw. You’re the digital copy of a person who was paid to test a corporate product. But the product is convinced it’s as human as you are. Maybe even more.

Key Features

  • Spend your days in a comfortable virtual world. Learn more about Mesa, break her defenses, and eliminate her delusions.
  • When you’re not working, roam the land and CAPTCHA your environment.
  • Get to know the various employees working hard to ensure everything goes as smoothly as possible.
  • Keep up to date on your corporeal body, who will spend her days living the life you’ve always dreamed of in the outside world.
  • At the end of the program, decide if you’d like to re-merge your two selves or discard your work self.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/black-tabby-publishing-and-sunset-visitor-announce-sci-fi-narrative-adventure-game-prove-youre-human-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Borderlands Mobile announced
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone

From Zynga and NaturalMotion.

A limited-time test of free-to-play looter shooter Borderlands Mobile is now available for iOS via App Store in the United States from publisher Zynga and developer NaturalMotion. A FAQ is available here, and a user survey here.

“We are always exploring ways to introduce Borderlands to new audiences,” a Zynga representative told Gematsu. “Zynga’s NaturalMotion studio is currently conducting a limited-time test for an untitled Borderlands mobile project, with Gearbox providing creative guidance on the franchise’s design, history, and lore.”

Here is an overview of the game, via App Store:

Create Mayhem YOUR way! Loot wild weapons and blast enemies in this mobile Borderlands experience.

Join other Vault Hunters in an ever-evolving universe to fight greedy corporations and open legendary Vaults. This action-packed looter shooter brings the signature chaos, art style, and gun-slinging adventure to mobile for the first time!

Hunt down legendary loot drops and power up your abilities to customize the way you play. Use everything from pistols to rocket launchers to make your enemies wish they never crossed your path!

Master devastating action gameplay that’s been fully optimized for mobile. Fight skags, bandits, and bosses as you battle through a variety of exciting mission types, including Campaign Missions, Tower of Terror, and Circle of Slaughter.

What are you waiting for, Vault Hunter! The vaults won’t open themselves( and those bandits won’t shoot themselves either).



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/borderlands-mobile-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
